calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff 540 Jones St. Hotel LLC, with owner Varsha Patel.
Jessical Chylik, Esq. for and with Defendant Patrick Dunlay.
Parties reached a settlement agreement and did not request the terms of the agreement be put on the record. A written stipulation to be filed per JPT Raifsnider.

The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Advanced From Apr-05-04 To Mar-17-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT PATRICK DUNLAY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off Calendar; matter was heard and ruled upon on 3/17/04. (JLW/301) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patrick Dunlay, Defendant Propria Persona
Gadalupe Gamino, Esq. (415) 706-2090
RULING:
DEFENDANT PATRICK DUNLAY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Order signed. (301/AJR/) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
